def parse_json_payload(data, depth=0):
    # Correct: strictly enforce a maximum recursion depth when processing arbitrary or untrusted nested structures
    if depth > 100:
        raise ValueError("Payload exceeds maximum permitted nesting depth of 100")
        
    for key, value in data.items():
        if isinstance(value, dict):
            parse_json_payload(value, depth + 1)
        else:
            process_leaf(key, value)
